label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Richard could have gone to the bakery. So, here's the problem. We have a list of times when different people saw Richard doing various things, and we need to find the time window when he wasn't doing any of those things, right? Because the bakery was closed after 7pm, so he had to go before that. Let me break down each person's sighting and see where the gaps are. First, Richard woke up at 8am. So he's definitely awake from 8am onward. Then, Betty saw him at the library from 9am to 2pm.
